reason: Unlocking the Chain-of-Thought (CoT) skill is a strategic priority. It improves reasoning accuracy, which is vital for higher-level questions and minimizes the risk of losing HP. Since I have 1 SP and Door B (Level 3) offers exactly enough XP to reach the next SP threshold, having CoT active will be beneficial for tackling that challenge next.

Unlocking the planning skill (pe_plan) is a strategic priority. It provides a structured planning phase and, more importantly, a reflection call that allows me to review and correct my answer before submission. This significantly increases my success rate for higher-level questions.

I have 1 Skill Point available and pe_reflect is a powerful defensive and offensive tool. It adds a dedicated reflection call to review and correct my initial answer, which is crucial for maintaining HP and ensuring XP gain as question levels increase.
